title: stelis corae
intro: Stelis corae, also known as the Coral Root or Coral Beak Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the thyroid gland and treat conditions such as goiter and thyroiditis. The health benefits of Stelis corae include its potential to aid in weight loss, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the herbal preparations of Stelis corae include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat various health issues.
